summary: An outstanding late‑era 1993 show praised as a throwback to the 1972 monster performances; recording source is unknown but the performance receives high acclaim.
review: Reviewers hail this May 1993 concert as one of the best late‑era shows, likening it to the legendary 1972 monsters and noting Dick Latvala’s personal endorsement. While no technical details about the tape are given, the enthusiastic 5‑star rating signals a highly enjoyable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review is available, but it gives a very strong positive endorsement of the performance; lack of recording‑quality details limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound quality, balance, or source; rating inferred from overall high praise.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes the show’s overall greatness and its “throwback” feel to classic 1972 shows; no specific set‑list commentary provided.
